name: Api → Connected
description: This [Condition](https://esphome.io/automations/actions#all-conditions) checks if at least one client is connected to the ESPHome native API.

config_entries.label: State Subscription Only
config_entries.description: If enabled, only counts clients that have subscribed to entity state updates. This filters out logger-only connections (such as `esphome logs` command), which can cause false positives when waiting for Home Assistant. Defaults to `false`.
